sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports shortness of breath, particularly with exertion, and occasional salty foods. He also reports pain in his left hand and intermittent dizziness. The patient reports a previous concern about a possible heart attack.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 142/88. Heart rate is 78 bpm and regular. The doctor observes mild edema in the lower extremities. An echocardiogram shows left ventricular hypertrophy.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms and examination findings are consistent with heart failure exacerbation. The history of a previous concern about a heart attack is relevant.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Start furosemide 40 mg daily. Order a repeat echocardiogram in 2 weeks. Schedule follow-up with cardiology in 1 week.
